reasoning: Article 30 of GDPR requires maintaining records of processing activities, which in a Kubernetes context can be mapped to audit logging and data protection measures. Kubernetes audit logs can provide records of API interactions, which are crucial for tracking processing activities. Ensuring audit logging is enabled and properly configured aligns with this requirement. Additionally, etcd encryption ensures that sensitive data stored in etcd is protected, aligning with GDPR's data protection requirements.
title: Article 30 Records of processing activities
